meta.title: Victor Kuwandira – Frontend Developer | React, Next.js, TypeScript
meta.description: Portfolio of Victor Kuwandira, frontend-focused software developer. Showcasing projects in React, Next.js, TypeScript, and AI-powered integrations. Explore case studies, coding work, and tech insights.

description.stack: Specialized in React, Next.js, and headless CMS architectures.

services.title: Digital Solutions
services.description: Building fast, reliable, and user-centric products designed to help your business grow and your team thrive.
services.ctaDescription: I'm always looking for new challenges and opportunities to grow.

header.title: CAREER PATH
header.subtitle: A record of professional growth and academic excellence across global boundaries.

achievements: Developed headless WordPress sites achieving 96%+ Lighthouse scores.
Built a live content preview system using webhooks for real-time sync.
Increased user signups by 15% with Brevo automation and lead capture.
Translated business goals into technical solutions with the founder.
Improved an internal web app for 200+ staff as part of a four-person Scrum team.
Reduced task completion time by 30% through targeted front-end enhancements.
Raised usability scores in pilot testing through rigorous user research.
Led 100+ IoT system installations, improving operational efficiency for clients.
Managed e-commerce operations on Ecwid, processing 500+ orders.
Streamlined inventory and sales workflows to optimize business operations.

details: Gained experience across the full software development lifecycle through real-world projects.
Focused studies on human-computer interaction and business development.
Collaborated in agile teams, building a strong foundation in information systems.
Completed a seven-month internship focused on user research and web app development.
Built a strong foundation in software development principles.
Hands-on projects with OOP languages and core computer science concepts.

testimonials.title: Testimonials
testimonials.description: What collaborators, clients, and mentors say about working with me.

items.name: David Findlay
items.quote: This is great, Victor. The look, feel, design, CRM, and coding for the assessment aside, you solved my biggest pain point: content editing. With the simplified WordPress backend, I can easily update content while the design framework stays intact.

items.name: Dr. Dorina Rajanen
items.quote: Victor is reliable, systematic, and creative. He combines strong analytical thinking with a passion for design and development, delivering thoughtful, high-quality solutions. I highly recommend him.

items.name: Anjalee Wanigarathne
items.quote: Victor is a strong frontend developer with a solid understanding of UI and UX. He translates design concepts into effective interfaces, communicates clearly, and is a reliable team player.

contact.title: Let's build something
contact.description: Open to professional collaboration and engineering roles, focused on building scalable, user-centered products that deliver real business value.
